title: Spec-Gate Registry
description: Registry of one-line spec stubs for artifacts on gated canon surfaces (decision D7, adopted 2026-06-12). Checked fail-closed by FLOSS/scripts/spec_gate.py --check and advisorily by hook_post_write.py.

gated_surfaces.description: Workspace-relative directory prefixes whose files require registration.

entries.description: Workspace-relative forward-slash path -> spec stub entry.

spec.description: One-line statement of intent — the '-1 layer'. What is this artifact FOR?

spec_ref.description: Optional pointer to a fuller spec/design doc.

grandfathered.description: True when registered en masse at gate introduction (2026-06-12) without a deliberate spec pass. Backfill on next touch.
